name: Qr
goal: Render a scannable QR code as a single SVG path with no runtime dependencies and a hand-rolled encoder.
description: Pure-SVG QR code. The full ISO/IEC 18004 encoder ships in the bundle (byte mode, versions 1-40, error-correction levels L/M/Q/H). Auto-picks the smallest version that fits the data, picks the optimal mask via penalty scoring, and emits a single <path> with merged horizontal runs. Fully themable via --ce-qr-fg / --ce-qr-bg. No CDN, no canvas, no QR library.
limitations: Byte mode only — no numeric or alphanumeric optimization (URLs/text are fine; pure-numeric strings encode at the same density). Maximum capacity is v40 ECC L (~2953 bytes); larger inputs emit ce-qr-error. Render is synchronous (~1-2 ms for a v40 grid in modern engines) — not suitable for streaming live data.

props.name: value
props.description: Text or URL to encode. UTF-8 is supported (every byte counts toward capacity).

props.name: ecc
props.description: Error correction level. L=7%, M=15%, Q=25%, H=30%. Higher means more recovery on damaged scans but a denser grid.

props.name: size
props.description: Rendered SVG width and height in CSS pixels. The internal grid scales to fit.

props.name: margin
props.description: Quiet-zone modules around the code. Spec recommends 4. Lower for tight layouts (may reduce scanner reliability).

props.name: color
props.description: Foreground CSS color. When empty, uses --ce-qr-fg (default --ce-text). Accepts any CSS color.

props.name: bg
props.description: Background CSS color. When empty, uses --ce-qr-bg (default --ce-surface). Pass 'transparent' for no background.

events.name: ce-qr-error
events.description: Fires when value cannot fit in any version (>2953 bytes at ECC L). The component renders a fallback error message instead of an SVG.

cssVariables.name: --ce-qr-bg
cssVariables.description: Background color (quiet zone + light modules). Default: var(--ce-surface).

cssVariables.name: --ce-qr-radius
cssVariables.description: Optional border-radius on the SVG. Default: 0.

a11y.notes: SVG has role=img and aria-label set to the encoded value. The error fallback uses role=alert.
